name: Astro and Sprout [Alt Scenario]
description:

This was a request by coconutshampoo- it’s the same as the other alt but without the bunny suits

Og bot: Sprout-And-Astro-In-Heat-They-Go-To-You-For-Help

Here are some bot resources:

ᴍʏ ᴊʟʟᴍ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ

Oh and this bot is pretty token heavy with two characters and all, so I tried to cut it down, so keep that in mind if it starts to go out of character :p

I recommend using around 0.65 to 0.85 temperature for this bot!

♡´･ᴗ･`♡

I recommend to talk to both of them in the first couple of messages so it doesn’t focus on just one of them
